title: Substrate direct-write deny hook (FEAT-013 pillar 1)
description: PreToolUse(Edit|Write|NotebookEdit) hook that blocks any write whose file_path resolves under the active substrate dir (named by .pi-context.json contextDir): *.json and schemas/*.json. No escape — substrate repair flows through the CLI ops (a genuinely missing op is an FGAP, not a bypass). Closes the parallel ungated path around the op-layer's AJV/invariant/complete-task gates (feedback_architecture_enforcement: no parallel ungated paths). FEAT-013 R1.
acceptance_criteria: A direct Edit/Write/NotebookEdit targeting the active substrate's *.json or schemas/*.json is blocked at PreToolUse with stderr naming the ops-only rule; a write outside the substrate dir passes.
The block reads the active substrate dir from .pi-context.json contextDir, not a hardcoded name.
Regression cells: true-positive block on a .context/*.json edit; pass on a packages/** source edit and on an analysis/*.md write.
